en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 63

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 63
One of the biggest artist’s on the planet right now is a collaboration between many humans and a diffusion model. Is AI coming to liquidate our creativity?

Don’t let your market fears project onto creative endeavours. Prompt engineering is one of the most essential skills that you can stack to leverage the new means and memes of production. If you haven’t already, check out Disco Diffusion and there are already some base templates and a tutorial video provided for you on the F3M homeport here under “How Tos”.
We repeat CC0 a lot because it is fascinating and one of the most pivotal shifts in behavioural economics in memory. So what’s the repeat this week?

An interesting thread by VVD on just how radically misaligned OG web3 players in the space have become this market cycle. The fact that now on Opensea you can’t even name a collection the same as another without being DMCA blocked is insane, even when there is full fair use and prior art well established.

What’s funny about all of us, although not much, is the fact that it’s very convenient that most of these DMCAs and copyright take down notices are targeted at the average user who doesn’t have massive clout and expensive lawyers at their disposal. Yet, if you do have that, Opensea tends to overlook any potential issues.. cough cough **Tom Sachs** …..
Was Sartoshi’s exit a soft rug or performance art to complete the meme?

It looks a lot like what their satirical namesake Satoshi did, except for that 25%… probably could have figured out something a bit more in the spirit of continuing the growth of the community and simply followed Nouns’ example.
Is there more to come on this story? I guess we’ll have to wait and see.
Funny how Jack’s “Web5” is meant to be extra decentralised, yet, first thing you can notice on their site is all the legal terms and copyright. Good luck, but this is really just a silly troll.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 63

Yet, if you do have that, Opensea tends الى overlook any potential issues.. cough cough **Tom Sachs** …..
